description: Analyze the lateral velocity differential (shear) between the main channel and overbanks at the time of peak flow for each cross-section in the Muncie HEC-RAS model. Calculate the difference between Main Channel Velocity and Overbank Velocities (Left and Right) at the peak flow timestep. Export a CSV file to ~/Documents/hec_ras_results/lateral_shear_analysis.csv containing columns: River_Station, Vel_Channel, Vel_Left, Vel_Right, and Max_Shear_Diff. Save a summary of the top 3 River Stations with the highest shear differential to ~/Documents/hec_ras_results/high_shear_zones.txt.
